title: 2016-2022 Lexus RX350 Transmission Fluid Replacement Instructions
description: Replace transmission fluid on 2016 and newer Lexus RX 350 models using an overflow-type level setting system requiring precise fluid temperature control.
tips: Always remove the fill plug before draining — if the fill plug is seized, you'll have no way to refill the transmission.
Lift all four corners of the vehicle so it sits parallel to the ground; an uneven angle will cause incorrect fluid level setting.
Do not perform this service on a severely slanted driveway.
Intentionally overfill the transmission slightly so excess fluid overflows during the level-setting procedure — never underfill.
The fluid temperature must be 35–45°C (95–113°F) during overflow level adjustment; too hot causes underfill, too cold causes overfill.
If you lack a scan tool, use a metal paper clip or stripped jumper wire to connect terminals 4 and 13 on the DLC3 connector to enter temperature detection mode.
The D indicator staying solid means fluid is in the correct temperature range; flashing means too hot; off means too cold.
Lube the drain plug O-ring with fresh transmission fluid before reinstalling.
Do not replace the overflow tube plug O-ring until the final fluid level adjustment step.
After lowering the vehicle, confirm the D indicator is still solid before shutting off the engine to verify temperature stayed within range.

torque_specs.fastener: Drain plug with overflow tube assembly
Overflow tube drain plug (level adjustment plug)
